description: Europe's leading digital healthcare provider operating across UK, France, and Norway. Combines digital technology with clinical expertise to serve NHS, health insurers, and patients. Part of Kry Group.
business_model: B2B2C - NHS partnerships + Private insurers + Direct to patient
target_market: UK (NHS and private), France (private), Norway (public system)
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: Pan-European presence, proprietary tech stack, largest digital GP network, 4.9 app rating

varden_fit.rationale: Major competitor in UK and France - strong brand, scale, and tech capabilities
